fields.description:
## Why
Field evidence since the 2026-07-08 plan-review recalibration (782 runs / 225 tickets): 18% of tickets need 4+ review rounds and the sticky tail consumes 60% of gate compute; 38 PASS->BLOCK flips (22 remediation-induced, 16 pure sampling-miss); 32% verdict instability on byte-identical plans; 95% of remediation edits mint new findings (net +324 across 430 edit rounds). The shipped cross-round convergence machinery — the plan-review rising floor (epic 7d43, children ec89/cc5b) and the code-review region-gated floor (ADR 0037) — is INERT behind default-False flags. The operator has authorized flipping both flags ON BY DEFAULT on this field evidence (superseding the discriminates_novelty-eval prerequisite), with a follow-up task (49ae-258b-4534-4d83) to remove the flags entirely.

## What
- In src/rebar/_config_schema.py flip `remediation_mode: bool = False` -> `True` (line 264) and `novelty_drop_active: bool = False` -> `True` (line 282).
- Rewrite the adjacent comments to default-ON framing with explicit-false as the back-out. Verbatim stale text to replace: line 262-263 'Default OFF for v1 (expand-contract: ship off → validate on the dogfood corpus → flip in a follow-up); off/absent restores byte-identical full-review behavior.' and lines 278-281 'The EVIDENCE GATE: the rising floor stays inert (gate runs un-floored) until this is flipped true — done MANUALLY by the operator only after 150b's `discriminates_novelty` eval has cleared its bar (`rebar prompt eval plan-review-novelty`). Default False (a third gate on top of remediation_mode + per-review eligibility), so the floor never drops a finding by default.'
- SHARED GATE — intentional cross-gate effect: `novelty_drop_active` is consumed by BOTH plan-review (src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py:204) AND the code-review region-gated floor (src/rebar/llm/code_review/workflow_ops.py:608 via src/rebar/llm/workflow/gate_dispatch.py:720). Flipping it by default activates the code-review floor too; this is deliberate and included in the operator authorization.
- Update the stale 'default-OFF v1 rollout' docstring in src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py:81 ('off/absent (default-OFF v1 rollout)' -> default-ON; explicit false is the back-out) and the inert-by-default note near :523.
- Update docs: docs/config.md (~lines 107-118 default table entries for verify.remediation_mode / verify.novelty_drop_active), docs/plan-review-gate.md (~lines 322-338 prose + ~370-374 default table), docs/adr/0008-convergent-plan-edit-re-review.md (~lines 55, 88-89, 96 default-off/inert-by-default framing) and docs/adr/0037-code-review-novelty-convergence.md (~lines 92, 167 OFF-by-default framing) — add a dated 'defaults flipped ON (operator-authorized on field evidence, 2026-07-11)' note rather than rewriting ADR history.
- Update stale default assertions in tests: tests/unit/test_plan_review_rising_floor.py:166 (`assert vc.novelty_drop_active is False`) and tests/unit/test_plan_review_remediation_gate.py:192 (`assert vc.remediation_mode is False`) — both flip to `is True`.
- NON-GOALS: completion_floor_active (epic 66ac, separate evidence gate) stays False; novelty_drop_threshold (0.7) / novelty_priority_floor (0.4) / remediation_window_minutes (60) unchanged; no change to the floor math or eligibility logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] VerifyConfig.remediation_mode defaults to True in src/rebar/_config_schema.py:264.
- [ ] VerifyConfig.novelty_drop_active defaults to True in src/rebar/_config_schema.py:282.
- [ ] Setting either key to false in config restores byte-identical full-review behavior; the existing explicit-False off-path tests (triple-gate) still pass unmodified in behavior.
- [ ] tests/unit/test_plan_review_rising_floor.py:166 and tests/unit/test_plan_review_remediation_gate.py:192 assert the new True defaults.
- [ ] Stale default-OFF comments/docstrings are updated in src/rebar/_config_schema.py and src/rebar/llm/plan_review/__init__.py (lines 81, ~523).
- [ ] docs/config.md and docs/plan-review-gate.md reflect the True defaults and record the operator-authorized flip in lieu of the discriminates_novelty eval.
- [ ] docs/adr/0008 and docs/adr/0037 carry a dated defaults-flipped note.
- [ ] completion_floor_active remains default False.
- [ ] make lint passes on the change.
- [ ] make typecheck passes on the change.
- [ ] make test passes on the change.
